column7: Supports saline-stress recovery; N promotes new tiller production after salt damage.
Provides nutritional buffer against salinity at establishment; potassium improves salt tolerance mechanisms.
Improves N availability in saline conditions; sulfur supports ion balance in salt-stressed plants.
Reduces salt toxicity through K-Na antagonism; critical fertilizer for saline-tolerant varieties.
Potassium oxide component helps maintain K:Na ratio in salt-stressed plants; reduces ion toxicity effects.
Algae-derived osmolytes help plants tolerate salt stress; nano-nutrients support ion homeostasis in saline soil.
Root exudate compounds improve Na displacement from exchange sites; organic matter reduces Na toxicity near roots.
Organic matter from Azolla decomposition improves saline soil structure; helps desalinize soil surface gradually.
Water-soluble foliar application effective when roots are salt-stressed; K foliar spray maintains K:Na ratio in leaves.
